title: meliosma henryi subsp. mannii
intro: Meliosma henryi subsp. mannii, also known as the Chinese meliosma, is a plant species in the family Meliosmaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Meliosma henryi subsp. mannii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used in Chinese medicine for centuries to treat various ailments.
